title: Wheres Carl Horn
wikitext:
[]: Where's Carl Horn?             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sat Jul 09, 2005 7:11 am where's he gone!? i've not seen him here for ages. and he was supposed to be getting me der mond :cry: anybody know where he's ran off to?

[]: Re: Where's Carl Horn?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Jul 09, 2005 12:41 pm ice reaper wrote: where's he gone!? i've not seen him here for ages. and he was supposed to be getting me der mond :cry: anybody know where he's ran off to?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 09, 2005 3:05 pm He'll be at the Comic Con in San Diego, which is July 13- 17. It's obvious that he's an at least moderately busy guy. I'm sure he can be excused.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 09, 2005 4:05 pm Is the PM system broken?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Jul 09, 2005 7:12 pm DatDude wrote: Is the PM system broken?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:47 am Maybe he went to get a British flag

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sun Jul 10, 2005 5:46 am ice reaper wrote: the union flag not union jack like most people think. it's only union jack when it's on a british navy vessel.....hm. i was thinking: does any other flag hava an official name? this is just blowing the topic on it's tits, but what the hell.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sun Jul 10, 2005 3:34 pm .... umm whos carl horn? (huddles up and waits for the huge WHAT!!!)

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Jul 10, 2005 3:53 pm Hi there! Ever read the Evangelion manga????????

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:57 pm Carn Horn worked for Viz and served as the editor (and stuff) for the NGE manga, along with writing the supplemental 'dossier' stuff in the backs of some volumes. He works for Dark Horse now, but AFAIK he still works on the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Jul 10, 2005 5:39 pm ^ What Recchi said.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Jul 12, 2005 11:04 am ........i'm being very carefull when i say this; maybe he's buisy editing the new manga. it's about time it came out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 12, 2005 11:45 am Volume 9 is out over here already. Volume 10 doesn't exist yet, even in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Jul 13, 2005 11:39 am i know volume 9 is out in america, i always get evangelion manga sent to me from there; there's no differance between the american and english versions anyway. i thought maybe we'd be lucky with volume 10, but it seems sadamoto's being quite 'leisurely about it again.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jul 19, 2005 6:11 pm ok so what is the NGE manga thing??? is it the same story? or something new?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 19, 2005 6:18 pm TheBlueTree wrote: ok so what is the NGE manga thing??? is it the same story? or something new?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 19, 2005 10:19 pm I wouldn't say "more obvious". That's implying things about the anime that aren't necessarily true... (Well, Rei had dirty intentions deep down in there. "Ooooo yes Ikari-kun! I want you! Let's biofuse! The fact that our Evas are helplessly drawn into my foul desires just makes it all the more kinky!" Shinji was all like, "Instrumentality sucks. Get off me. And out of me, for that matter.") Perhaps it would be more accurate to say that Sadamoto introduces dynamics that weren't originally there, at the expense of our favorite disagreement. And, uh, Tree. Google. Query: "Evangelion manga about differences". Read whatever looks promising.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 10:21 pm TheBlueTree wrote: ok so what is the NGE manga thing??? is it the same story? or something new?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jul 20, 2005 10:47 am Hey thx for that... i looked it up... and i found it... but my god damn internet is being gay and wont let me goto it lol
